properties.Name: Legislative Council Complex
properties.Description: Stormed by protesters on July 1 2019 — symbolic reclaiming of legislative space

properties.Name: Government HQ Civic Square
properties.Description: Fenced off after 2014 Umbrella Movement. Site of repeated occupation attempts in 2019
properties.Argument: Fencing = denial of right to city

properties.Name: Harcourt Road
properties.Description: Major arterial road occupied by protesters — transformed from traffic corridor to protest boulevard

properties.Name: Admiralty MTR Station
properties.Description: Transit hub turned protest convergence point. Closed repeatedly during clashes

properties.Name: Tamar Park
properties.Description: Public green space adjacent to government complex — frequent rally site

properties.Name: Protest Frontline Zone
properties.Description: Barricade lines repeatedly erected here — contested boundary between protesters and police

properties.Name: Central Government Offices
properties.Description: Key target of protest marches — symbol of Beijing authority over Hong Kong
